About

A builder who refuses
to leave things on paper.

Most people have ideas. I build them. From copper pot stills hand-fabricated in New Hampshire to a patent on the way heat moves through copper to custom foundry work — my work spans disciplines because the drive to make things real doesn't recognize category lines.

I've operated manufacturing businesses, developed original IP, run foundry operations, and fabricated equipment that doesn't exist anywhere else. I tend to go all-in on what I believe in — because I'd rather attempt something difficult than wonder if it could have worked.

Born in Boston. Raised in New Hampshire.

Ventures

Proprietary
🤖
SocialAI — Autonomous Social Media
My own AI platform · better than Hootsuite

I didn't license Hootsuite or Buffer — I built better. SocialAI is my own AI-run social-media command center: 13 command tabs, 25 engine modules, 10 networks. It writes the posts, designs the images, chats with customers in the DMs, scouts competitors, jumps on trends, A/B tests, and publishes everywhere — fully autonomous, 24/7.

🔥
MoonshineStills.com
Copper Manufacturing

American-made copper distillation equipment — pot stills, thumpers, condensers, and commercial systems. Heavy copper construction. Real fabrication. Not imported.

🎙️
IVR.Agency
AI Communication Services

Done-for-you AI that answers your phone, texts, and email 24/7 — voice agents in your own cloned voice, SMS AI, and email automation, built and managed for businesses.

🛠️
CopperPlumbingSupplies.com
Wholesale Plumbing Supply

Wholesale copper plumbing fittings — elbows, tees, valves, and pipe at bulk pricing for contractors, builders, and plumbers. We source it; you save.

🖥️
P-C.store
Premium PC Retail

A premium personal-computer store — hand-picked laptops, desktops, monitors, and parts at fresh prices, with a sharper experience than the big-box sites.

🎓
fsaid.com
College Aid Guidance

Free, plain-English help with the FSA ID and FAFSA — how to apply, grants vs. loans, deadlines, and the common mistakes that cost students real money.

📖
MoonshineMagazine.com
Industry Publication

The magazine for everyone in the distillation industry. Stills, spirits, craft distilling, and the culture around it — all in one place.

🐻
Fort Wilkins
Workshop & Showroom · Pittsfield, NH

The physical home of everything we build. Named after the infamous Alchemist G.G. Wilkins of Pittsfield, NH — copper is still cut, formed, soldered, and tested here by human hands. Nothing is given. Everything is forged.

💛
PH-Dating.com
Dating Platform

A dating site connecting people with Filipino singles. Built from the ground up — currently being relaunched.

🎯
Peer2Prospect
Social Intelligence Tool

Built a system that scanned competitors' Facebook, Instagram, and YouTube pages and groups for targeted keywords — then let you privately message the people publicly engaging with their content. Your competitor's audience, redirected.

💬
TextAI — KillYourVA.com
SMS & Email Automation

Automated text message and email responses that work around the clock — so you never have to pay an overseas admin assistant again.

Signature Invention

Flame-Flow™
Patented.
Original.

Patented Design

Flame-Flow™ is my most significant invention — a distillation design that heats up in half the time and reduces scorching. It's what separates handcrafted American stills from everything else on the market. This is the kind of invention that defines a career.
